title: Summary: Turn 28
content: Pueblo is a TypeScript CLI + Electron desktop agent framework (v0.1.0) with SQLite persistence, Vitest tests, and a layered architecture (input routing → command/agent execution → LLM provider adapters → tools → SQLite). Core modules include agent runtime, commands, memory (semantic embeddings), sessions, providers (GitHub Copilot, DeepSeek), and desktop (Electron with React renderer).
